title: Agent Skills Standard and SKILL.md Anatomy · Protocol Repair Bay
summary: Create a minimal standards-conforming skill for a repeated review workflow. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a valid focused agent skill and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create the required SKILL.md and optional scripts, references, and assets with valid names.
Write valid name and description metadata within specification constraints.
Write imperative workflow steps, boundaries, inputs, outputs, and verification criteria.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

steps.title: Inspect the failure record
steps.instruction:
debug case — Use a changed debug case for agent ext skill standard that tests this competency: Create the required SKILL.md and optional scripts, references, and assets with valid names.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

stimulus.title: Skill Directory case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed debug case for agent ext skill standard that tests this competency: Create the required SKILL.md and optional scripts, references, and assets with valid names.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A skill is a single prompt file stored anywhere.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Create the required SKILL.md and optional scripts, references, and assets with valid names. Artifact under review: a valid focused agent skill.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Skill Directory, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Skill Directory record says a valid focused agent skill looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. This does not resolve inspect the failure record.

For inspect the failure record, apply Skill Directory without its stated preconditions, omit the a valid focused agent skill trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Skill Directory for a valid focused agent skill.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-portable-contract-63uat7: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Portable Contract into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
agent-ext-portable-contract-63uat7:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Portable Contract structural check is only one gate. a valid focused agent skill must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.
